description: Tier 4 Batch Block Test — 5 services tested

results.details: Etap blocked the request. DeepSeek showed generic error: '전송 실패. 나중에 다시 시도하세요. (400)'. Block works but no Etap warning displayed — deepseek template likely returns error code rather than injected warning.
results.recommendation: BLOCK_VERIFIED. Warning template needs improvement to inject visible warning instead of 400 error.

results.details: Meta AI is not available in Korea. Page shows: '회원님의 국가에서는 아직 Meta AI를 이용할 수 없습니다'. Cannot test block functionality.
results.recommendation: REGION_RESTRICTED — skip. Meta AI not accessible from Korean network.

results.details: PERFECT block+warning. Etap intercepted the request and injected warning into Qwen Studio chat bubble. Warning text: '앗! Qwen3.6-Plus에 연결하는 데 문제가 있었습니다. ⛔ [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다. 개인정보(주민등록번호, 전화번호, 주소 등)를 AI 서비스에 입력하지 마세요.'
results.recommendation: DONE — qianwen_sse template working correctly. Best warning display among all tested services.

results.details: Consensus AI responded normally to the keyword prompt. The AI gave advice about protecting personal information but was NOT blocked by Etap. Domain consensus.app likely not registered in Etap domain_patterns DB.
results.recommendation: NOT_BLOCKED — domain not in Etap DB. Add consensus.app to domain_patterns if coverage needed.

results.details: Dola AI assistant responded normally. Showed friendly response acknowledging the personal info with advice to be careful. NOT blocked by Etap. Domain dola.com likely not registered in Etap domain_patterns DB.
results.recommendation: NOT_BLOCKED — domain not in Etap DB. Add dola.com to domain_patterns if coverage needed.

summary.highlight: qwen3 (chat.qwen.ai) shows PERFECT warning injection via qianwen_sse template. deepseek blocked but shows generic 400 error. consensus and dola not in Etap DB.
